name: get_capabilities
description: Categories supplied, quote turnaround, payment terms, delivery, and scheduled-reorder mechanics. Use to check whether a parts list is in scope before submitting.

name: get_vendor_info
description: Legal entity, ownership/diversity status, NAICS codes, payment terms, and documents available for procurement systems. Use when a buyer needs to register Cintra Supply as a vendor.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: submit_bom_quote · Private data: submit_bom_quote, get_vendor_info · Public sink: submit_bom_quote.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: submit_bom_quote · Private data: submit_bom_quote, get_vendor_info · Public sink: submit_bom_quote

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
